title: ilex nervosa
intro: Ilex nervosa, also known as the Pacific holly or Oregon holly, is a shrub or small tree native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Ilex nervosa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Ilex nervosa is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in capsule or powder form, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a variety of health concerns.
